states.name: Callen
states.title: Brilliant Magic Researcher Girl
states.description: A long, long time ago a prodigy was born in a faraway elven village. The talk of the town for years, she was invited to work at a research institute, but when she arrived there, the head researcher couldn't hide his surprise. That's because the famed genius looked like she couldn't be older than ten.

states.name: Callen
states.title: Brilliant Magic Researcher Girl
states.description: Before long, rumours about her impertinence, her weird laugh, and her penchant for sweets and junk food swept the institute. However, her talent and passion for research were unparalleled, and the mockery surrounding her soon turned into envy.

states.name: Callen
states.title: Brilliant Magic Researcher Girl
states.description: Even after all these years, her teacher's memory is fresh in her mind. Wiser than anyone she knew, the one she respected like no-one else, the one lost to her childish thoughtlessness. She has devoted herself to her research, in hope that one day she can atone for her past and live up to the ideal he set.
